subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! I have read thy recent letter which indicateth the burning fire of thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله انی قرئت تحریرک الاخیر الدال علی تسعر نار محبه
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @service to others; to the Cause of God
